title: Crawl
description: Movement adjustment allowing you to crawl.
body:
![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48a1954f14e2e1d4816014bddff2f6e705d10158.png) With the let me Crawl , getting into tight spaces has never been easier! This mod allows you to automatically enter "crawl" mode (crawling) simply by shifting in front of a tunnel or space of minimum height. ![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5da0442fcc8f2d77453f4c79a2bfcb0c84b1c0fc.png) No complicated or advanced mechanical controls are needed: just position and lower yourself to glide smoothly through narrow passages. ![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d818bb7e5f5e448dec280434683d5446b391b2e5.png) Intuitive crawling: press "Shift" in front of a 1x1 opening to scramble. Improved gameplay: explore narrow caves, build secret bases or create adventurous routes! Create new routes, discover hidden corners and make your gameplay even more engaging with Let me crawl! # Website If you have any questions, need assistance, or simply want to share your thoughts or feedback, feel free to reach out. We're always here to help and would love to hear from you – whether you're looking for answers, suggestions, or just want to let us know how we're doing.
![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a21d1c453796757f5e27ce9b94e648664755964_0.webp)![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb8b289a15c3eee79a8540f279e3486f6e7e22fc.png)
